programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: Raging Bull, (2020, Drama)
programme.desc: RAGING BULL is director Martin Scorsese's lacerating film biography of middleweight boxing champion Jake LaMotta, who was known during his brief reign as "the Bronx Bull."

programme.title: Gangs Of New York, (2003, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese's epic film set in mid-19th century Lower Manhattan tells the story of a young Irish immigrant (Leonardo DiCaprio) seeking revenge against the rival gang leader who killed his father.

programme.title: Bringing Out the Dead, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: Frank Pierce, a paramedic, is on the brink of madness from too many years of saving and losing lives. One fateful night, Frank meets Mary Burke, the daughter of a man Frank tried to save. Together, Frank and Mary confront the ghosts of the past.

programme.title: Shutter Island, (2010, Thriller)
programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: Silence, (2016, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese’s Silence tells the story of two missionaries who travel to Japan in search of their missing mentor at a time when Christianity is outlawed. When they are captured, both men are plunged into an odyssey that will risk their lives.

programme.title: Shutter Island, (2010, Thriller)
programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: Diary of the Dead, (2007, Zombies)
programme.desc: While on location filming a horror movie, a group of college students finds themselves overrun by zombies, and ultimately end up capturing the epidemic on film.

programme.title: Skinwalkers, (2007, Action)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy and his mother become the targets of two warring werewolf packs, each with different intentions and motives.

programme.title: Bats, (1999, Creature Features)
programme.desc: Genetically mutated bats escape, and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Mimic, (1997, Creature Features)
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Urban Legend, (1998, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: When New England college student Natalie finds herself at the center of a series of sadistic murders seemingly inspired by urban legends, she resolves to find the truth about Pendleton's own legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers, (2001, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2, (2003, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: Hereditary, (2018, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter (Toni Collette) and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: Hush, (2016, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Down a Dark Hall, (2018, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on Lois Duncan's young adult thriller, story follows Kit Gordy, a new student at Blackwood Boarding School, who must unlock the mysteries of the school's tragic past.

programme.title: Carrie, (2013, Supernatural Horror)

programme.title: In Fabric, (2019, Thriller)

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil, (2014, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Orochimaru and Kabuto use a summoning jutsu to call forth a giant snake. Still drugged and unable to fully use his chakra, Jiraiya summons little Gamakichi.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto’s ninja way is to never go back on his word. Naruto is seriously injured by Kabuto and hovers on the verge of death.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Jiraiya, Tsunade and Orochimaru all release their summoning jutsu. And a fierce battle begins.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Tsunade, Naruto, and the others start heading back to the Leaf Village where Tsunade will formally become the Fifth Hokage. At Tsunade's urging, they stop at a town with hot springs.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Suicide Kings, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: A group of youngsters kidnap a respected Mafia figure.

programme.title: The Gambler, (2013, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: An adventure of a millionaire playboy who steals a priceless work of art and then strikes up a fiery romance with the brilliant female insurance investigator who is on to his game.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Hoodlum, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Dead Presidents, (1995, Crime)
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet, drawn to crime after the war, plans the ultimate heist.

programme.title: Armored, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: A crew of officers at an armored transport security firm embark on the ultimate heist – against their own company. The seemingly fool-proof plan soon proves to be useless when an unexpected witness interferes, as the plan quickly unravels.

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: Bull Durham, (1988, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a minor-league North Carolina baseball team (the Triple A Durham Bulls) and its attentive, intelligent groupie who feels it is her mission to live with one young player per season and help him mature.

programme.title: The Open Road, (2009, Drama)
programme.desc: A minor leaguer (Justin Timberlake) hits the road to track down his estranged father, legendary baseball player Kyle Garret (Jeff Bridges), when his mother becomes sick.

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: Bull Durham, (1988, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a minor-league North Carolina baseball team (the Triple A Durham Bulls) and its attentive, intelligent groupie who feels it is her mission to live with one young player per season and help him mature.

programme.title: The Open Road, (2009, Drama)
programme.desc: A minor leaguer (Justin Timberlake) hits the road to track down his estranged father, legendary baseball player Kyle Garret (Jeff Bridges), when his mother becomes sick.

programme.title: Smoke, (1995, Dramedy)
programme.desc: The lives of a unique group of people intertwine after a New York cigar store manager named Auggie befriends them. This acclaimed, offbeat comedy features an all-star cast, and a mix of unexpected wit and reverence.

programme.title: Blue in the Face, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: A wacky group of locals visits the neighborhood cigar shop looking for good times and plenty of hilarious fun. But when the greedy owner threatens to close the shop for good, the neighborhood proves they'll do anything to save their favorite hangout.

programme.title: Slam Dance, (1987, Thriller)
programme.desc: A cartoonist and painter (Tom Hulce) must dig through the underbelly of the L.A. club scene when his ex-girlfriend (Virginia Madsen) is found dead and he is framed for the murder.

programme.title: Postcards from the Edge, (1990, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Meryl Streep, Shirley MacLaine, Gene Hackman, Dennis Quaid and Richard Dreyfuss star in Mike Nichols' hilarious blockbuster film about a very real mother-daughter relationship set against the backdrop of today's Hollywood. Rated: R

programme.title: Searching For Bobby Fischer, (1993, Drama)
programme.desc: Josh is a typical seven-year-old who happens to be a chess prodigy. Josh’s father is determined to see his son become a champion. During their journey of discovery, they learn the one thing neither can afford to lose: their love for each other.

programme.title: Stepmom, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: In & Out, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Postcards from the Edge, (1990, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Meryl Streep, Shirley MacLaine, Gene Hackman, Dennis Quaid and Richard Dreyfuss star in Mike Nichols' hilarious blockbuster film about a very real mother-daughter relationship set against the backdrop of today's Hollywood. Rated: R

programme.title: How Stella Got Her Groove Back, (1998, Romance)
programme.desc: Stella's vacation to Jamaica takes a hot and steamy turn when she encounters a young islander.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding, (1994, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In this perfect marriage of feel-good comedy and heartfelt drama, a shy daydreamer finds the courage to leave on a tropical vacation, where she meets a wacky new friend, changes her name, and turns her world upside down, all to an ABBA soundtrack.

programme.title: Capricorn One, (1977, Thriller)
programme.desc: A NASA Mars mission won't work, and its funding is endangered, so they decide to fake it just this once. But then they have to keep the secret.

programme.title: Love And Bullets, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's mistress in Switzerland.

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as an ex-con and Vietnam vet whose efforts to run a straight business soon have him locking horns with both the law and the mafia in this explosive tale of backwoods revenge.

programme.title: The White Buffalo, (1977, Action)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Dillinger, (1973, Drama)
programme.desc: An account of the notorious gangster, John Dillinger, from midway through his bank-robbing career up until his final shootout outside the Biograph Theatre.

programme.title: 1900, (1977, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Set in the countryside of the Province of Emilia in Italy, the story of two men, one a bastard born into a family of farm workers, the other an heir to a wealthy family of landowners.

programme.title: Catch-22, (1970, Comedy)
programme.desc: The tale of a small group of flyers in the Mediterranean in 1944. Separately and together, they are nervous, frightened, often profane and sometimes pathetic. Almost all are a little crazy. Catch-22 is an anti-war satire of epic proportions.

programme.title: The Boys From Brazil, (1978, Thriller)
programme.desc: A Nazi hunter in Paraguay discovers a sinister and bizarre plot to rekindle the Third Reich.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a Wild West showdown between Yugi and his fiercest challenge yet: Rafael and his guardian monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi calls on the legendary strength of Timaeus, but when it's not enough to crack Rafael's defense, will Yugi resort to desperate measures and go against everything he believes in to make the riskiest move of his life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the abilities of Seal of Orichalcos, Yugi grinds Rafael's guardians, but he's also succumbing to the card's evil influence. As darkness grows within his heart, the consequences of his non-heroic acts may be his undoing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has captured Yugi's soul! Broken and unmotivated, how will our heroes ever rescue Yugi, especially when Dartz has a duo of nefarious new recruits ready to eradicate them?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: A cross-country expedition turns tragic when Dartz's new duelists separate Yugi from Joey in order to capture their souls separately.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Nothing will stop Weevil and Rex Raptor from quenching their thirst for revenge by capturing Yugi and Joey's souls!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost the trust of Timaeus, Yugi can no longer use his guardian dragon against Weevil's insect invasion. Discouraged and confused, Yugi has lost his dueling instincts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is on a vision quest where he must travel through a past of evil to find and conquer his greatest foe... himself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is in no shape to duel... but Dartz doesn't care! Dartz sends out his ancient annihilator Orichalcos Soldier to finish Yugi once and for all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Valon is ready to take on the world and fight... for the heart of Mai? And the first adversaries standing in his way are Duke and Rebecca!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel thirty thousand feet in the air as Alister squares off against Kaiba on top of an airplane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Alister dispatches his airborne arsenal Air Fortress Ziggurat! How can Kaiba defeat a monster the size of the plane itself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has taken over KaibaCorp! Can Kaiba, with Yugi's help, break into his own company which he's protected with the latest in security technology?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With chaos running rampant, Valon separates Joey from his friends for a final showdown with Mai's heart on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Valon's battle rages to its climax as Joey attempts to turn the duel around by augmenting the same armor that Valon used against him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Broken and battered after his exhausting battle against Valon, Joey can barely stand up, much less duel. However, he faces a fresh and determined Mai.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a rematch between the Pharaoh and Rafael - but this time, the Pharaoh doesn't have Yugi to protect him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael appears to be creating an opening for the Pharaoh's counterattack, but Rafael has even more dreadful displays of terror in mind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael calls forth Guardian Dreadscythe, a ravaging reaper that can never be defeated.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After discovering the location of Dartz's secret base, our heroes are on their way to stop Dartz once and for all. Can they reach Dartz before he resurrects the lethal Grand Dragon Leviathan from its millennial slumber?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz's secrets are finally revealed! As the answers to the most puzzling questions are exposed, the Pharaoh and Kaiba realize how much is at stake.

programme.title: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Paramount War! The Inherited Will of the King of the Pirates!

programme.title: Stelly, Sabo's adopted brother and now the king of the Goa Kingdom, walks up to Garp who is escorting the royal family of the Fish-Man Island, with an air of importance and something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: One Step Forward for Her Dream! Shirahoshi Goes Out in the Sun!

programme.title: Shirahoshi and her family finally reach the Holyland of Mariejois! But all the unexpected attention confuses her. Meanwhile, Vivi from Alabasta meets Leo and Rebecca from Dressrosa, and tells them the story of her journey with the Straw Hats.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Miss Him! Vivi and Rebecca's Sentiments!

programme.title: Vivi reunites with Dalton and Dr. Kureha from the Sakura Kingdom and they share their memories of the Straw Hats with Shirahoshi and Rebecca. Meanwhile, a shadowy figure descends a long staircase at the castle in the Holyland and opens a mysterious door.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: In the Dark Recesses of the Holyland! A Mysterious Giant Straw Hat!

programme.title: Shirahoshi crosses the fancy of a Celestial Dragon, and those living gods are not open to having their whims disobeyed! As she is dragged away, King Neptune comes to her rescue, risking life and limb by defying the Celestial Dragon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Holyland in Tumult! The Targeted Princess Shirahoshi!

programme.title: The Emperors of the Sea, Big Mom and Kaido decide to team up against Luffy! Meanwhile, Garp hears about the wild exploits of his grandson, all while a mysterious outsider visits the highest authority in the world!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Explosive Situation! Two Emperors of the Sea Going After Luffy!

programme.title: After sneaking into the Land of the Gods, Sabo sees the shocking figure of his friend – Kuma! Abused by the World Government as a pawn in their games, Kuma, who was made an example of what happens when you disobey the gods!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sabo Enraged! The Tragedy of the Revolutionary Army Officer Kuma!

programme.title: The Reverie has begun! The representative kings and queens first discuss what to do with Straw Hat Luffy. Meanwhile the Revolutionary Army confirms its desire to save Kuma! All while they recount how the Straw Hats have grown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally, It Starts! The Conspiracy-filled Reverie!

programme.title: In order to recruit a strong ally towards bringing down Kaido, Cat Viper and his crew stop by Whitebeard's homeland to see Marco, the 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Marco! The Keeper of Whitebeard's Last Memento!

programme.title: Luffy and the others become excited as they see familiar faces in a newspaper article about the Reverie while they close in on the Land of Wano. But this dangerous and foreboding land is as inaccessible as it is mysterious! The sea itself is a barrier!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Climbing Up a Waterfall! A Great Journey Through the Land of Wano's Sea Zone!

programme.title: A mysterious country, a rampaging slasher, ancient samurai rituals of seppuku - and Zoro in the crosshairs! When a street assault occurs, all signs point to Zoro! Meanwhile, Luffy finally arrives at the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Land of Wano! To the Samurai Country where Cherry Blossoms Flutter!

programme.title: Stranded alone on the beach, Luffy tries to gather his bearings only to be confronted by some mysterious, and dangerous, local fauna! And then, he meets a little girl named Otama! Meanwhile, Zoro makes trouble for the others who are trying to blend in!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Otama Appears! Luffy vs. Kaido's Army!

programme.title: Otama's gratitude towards Luffy knows no bounds! But the feast she cooks him exhausts her food stores completely! As she suffers from poor drinking water, her companion tells the story of the mysterious outsider she waits for - Ace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: He'll Come! The Legend of Ace in the Land of Wano!

programme.title: Ambushed and outgunned by a skilled bounty hunter Cidre's group, the Straw Hats rely on the Sunny's Coup de Burst to escape! But they end up stranded without cola! A nearby soda island offers a solution.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Side Story! The World's Greatest Bounty Hunter, Cidre!

programme.title: Luffy and Boa Hancock square off against the Cidre Guild! These unscrupulous bounty hunters have one thing in mind - profit at any cost! When the battle looks won, Cidre gears up in a menacing power suit!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Side Story! Clash! Luffy vs. the King of Carbonation!

programme.title: Otama recounts her promise to Ace while Luffy rushes her to medical attention. But just as they reach the wasteland, a familiar face comes into view! But Kaido's underlings show up too!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Otama! Straw Hat, Bounding through the Wasteland!

programme.title: Otama's temperature is going up and Luffy has no time to waste! However, Hawkins, one of Kaido's Headliners, blocks their way by showing his unique powers and skills which can harm his own men.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Headliner! Hawkins the Magician Appears!

programme.title: Luffy and Zoro have been stalled by Hawkins but their fortune looks bright as they are guided by a woman who Zoro had saved. She leads them to a teahouse and to an herbal remedy for the river poison.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defeat is Inevitable! The Strawman's Fierce Attack!

programme.title: Otama's life is saved by Otsuru at her teahouse. The proud Otama finds it hard to take more kindness. The group learns of the Okobore Town - living on the cast-offs of the officials! Then, suddenly, they were attacked by the Shogun's men!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Day of My Life! Otama and Her Sweet Red-bean Soup!

programme.title: Otama has been kidnapped by the Gifters! She is taken to a flourishing town called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking Headliner was expecting her. Luffy and Zoro rush to rescue her along with a samurai, Okiku!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Charging into the Enemy's Territory! Bakura Town - Where Officials Thrive!

programme.title: As Luffy, Zoro, and Okiku bounce through Bakura Town on Komachiyo's back, a sumo wrestler comes flying towards them! Interested, they go down to watch sumo but the undefeated yokozuna Urashima has been expecting Okiku there.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Yokozuna Appears! The Invincible Urashima Goes After Okiku!

programme.title: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in the Land of Wano, to a sumo match! Urashima even uses illegal moves to beat Luffy at any cost! Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he knows she committed a crime and he has to punish her for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Climactic Sumo Battle! Straw Hat vs. the Strongest Ever Yokozuna!

programme.title: After sending the yokozuna Urashima flying, Luffy and his clan continue their search for Bakura Town's boss to save Otama! They finally find the boss, Holdem, one of the Beast Pirates' Headliners.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Rages! Rescue Otama from Danger!

programme.title: Facing Holdem who is holding Otama as hostage, Luffy prepares for a fight but Okiku tries to stop him by sharing who is really ruling the region. Meanwhile, Basil Hawkins is confronted by a mysterious figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Taking Back Otama! A Fierce Fight Against Holdem!

programme.title: Taking down Holdem, Luffy rescues Otama and tries to catch up to Zoro and Okiku who stole the food treasure ship and started a mad dash to get out of the town!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Duel! The Magician and the Surgeon of Death!

programme.title: This is a story of Luffy in an alternate reality. While sailing on the sea by himself, a strange bird crashes into his small boat. He looks up to find a giant ship where a girl named Ann has been captured. It seems like the bird belongs to her.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Zoro and the others dash out of BakuraTown on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them bringing ahuge bucket of fresh water! Then, they distribute the food and the water to thepeople of Okobore Town who were thirsty and hungry.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Coming of the Treasure Ship! LuffytaroReturns the Favor!

programme.title: Luffy arrives at the ruins of Oden Castle following Law and finds the graves of his friends, Kin'emon and the others. As Law starts telling the already-stunned Luffy about the creepy story of Kin'emon's ghost, Luffy sees it coming towards him!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mysterious Grave Markers! A Reunion at the Ruins of Oden Castle!

programme.title: Kin'emon tells Luffy and the others about how Kozuki Oden made Kuri into a peaceful region and became its Daimyo. However, he was set up by Kaido and Kurozumi Orochi and executed.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Samurai! The Man Who Roger Admired!

programme.title: Kin'emon and the others crossed through time by the power of Kozuki Toki, Momonosuke's mother, and arrived at the Land of Wano 20 years later, a totally different country before their eyes.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bringing Down the Emperor of the Sea! A Secret Raid Operation Begins!

programme.title: Ashura Doji, one of the allies Kin'emon wants to search for, has become the head of a thieves brigade and they now raid Okobore Town taking away the food that Luffy gave to the people.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Man in the World! Shutenmaru, the Thieves Brigade Chief!

programme.title: The drunken Kaido flies above Okobore Town in his dragon form and threatens Shutenmaru and all the people in the town. Luffy, Law, Kin'emon, and Okiku start running towards the town to rescue them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone is Annihilated! Kaido's Furious Blast Breath!

programme.title: After Luffy sees Kaido shattering the ruins of Oden Castle where he left his friends, he becomes enraged and attacks Kaido! Soon after, he finds out Kaido even assaulted Otama who was riding on Speed's back to her home.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally Clashing! The Ferocious Luffy vs. Kaido!

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Shin Ultraman, (2023, Action)
programme.desc: A silver giant descends from the sky to rescue the planet. Dubbed Ultraman, this giant's identity and purpose are a mystery.

programme.title: Tank Girl, (1995, Adventure)
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: The Spirit, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: The One, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent on killing Gabriel.

programme.title: Ultraviolet, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich, Cameron Bright Nick Chinlund and William Fichtner star in this theatrical set in the late 21st century, where some humans have been modified genetically by a vampire-like disease and the world is pushed to the brink of worldwide civil war.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: The Gunfighter, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: The Dark Command, (1940, Western)
programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.title: Fort Massacre, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar, (1954, Western)

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Um caso de identidade equivocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra sendo tramada por dois dos chefes do crime mais rivais da cidade. Sob vigilância constante do detetive Brikowski e do assassino Goodkat, ele deve pegá-los antes que eles o peguem. programme.title: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09
programme.desc: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10
programme.desc: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E205
programme.desc: 2021. Com o súbito aparecimento do inimigo, Naruto, o Sétimo Hokage e líder da aldeia, desapareceu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O despertar de Ootsusuki - T15E206
programme.desc: 2021. Boruto e os outros atacam Boro para salvar Naruto, mas Boro os repele liberando uma misteriosa névoa negra que paralisa seus oponentes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12
programme.desc: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: 2001. O duelo de Brogy e Dorry é maculado pela maligna Baroque Works, e o duelo chega a uma conclusão - terá sido o julgamento de Elbaf?! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: As Tristes Lágrimas de Vitória do Brogy! O Julgamento de Elbaf!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E12

programme.title: 2001. Luffy luta para se libertar, e seus companheiros caem nas mãos da Baroque Works. As chances são baixas, mas o bando nunca se rende! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Vela do Demônio! Lágrimas de Arrependimento e Lágrimas de Fúria!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E13

programme.title: 2001. Luffy tenta resgatar seus companheiros, mas acaba caindo na armadilha de cores de Miss Golden Week! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Luffy é Atacado por Magia! Uma Armadilha de Cores!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E14

programme.title: 2001. Usopp e Luffy lutam contra a Baroque Works para salvar Zoro, Nami e Vivi! Enquanto isso, Sanji segue separado do grupo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Contra-ataque Providencial! O Raciocínio Rápido e a Estrela de Fogo de Usopp!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E15

programme.title: 2001. Luffy e os demais precisam se despedir da ilha dos gigantes Brogy e Dorry e seguir para a terra natal de Vivi, o Reino de Alabasta, ameaçado por uma guerra civil! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Adeus, Ilha dos Gigantes! Rumo a Alabasta!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E16

programme.title: 2001. Após partirem da ilha dos gigantes, os Chapéus de Palha agora precisam lidar com uma súbita doença que acomete Nami, e pode ser letal caso não achem um médico! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Nami Está Doente? Para Além da Neve Que Cai Sobre o Mar!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E17

programme.title: 2001. Luffy e os Chapéus de Palha são atacados por Wapol de Latão, e precisam deter a ameaça e seguir em busca de um médico que cure Nami! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Sob Ataque! O Navio Bliking e Wapol de Latão!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E18

programme.title: 2001. Luffy e os Chapéus de Palha não têm recepção calorosa na próxima ilha da Grand Line, mas precisam convencer os habitantes de que precisam de um médico para Nami. O que a nova ilha, porém, possui, é uma bruxa! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Uma Ilha sem Médicos? Aventura no Reino Desconhecido!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E19

programme.title: 2001. Luffy e Sanji seguem com Nami ao encontro da médica de Big Horn, mas Dalton, Vivi e Usopp descobrem que eles seguiram em vão, pois a médica está em outra vila! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: Estão Felizes? A Médica que Dizem ser Bruxa!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E20

programme.title: 2001. Wapol e seus homens voltam a Drum em busca de retomar seu reinado de terror. Mas Dalton não quer ver o retorno da tirania. Enquanto isso, a avalanche na montanha de neve pode engolir a cidade! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda
programme.sub-title: A Decisão de Dalton! As Tropas de Wapol Chegam à Ilha!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E21

programme.title: 2001. Luffy não desiste de conseguir o tratamento para Nami com a Dra. Kureha, e agora levará não só a navegadora, mas também Sanji, atingido pela avalanche, ao topo da montanha. programme.sub-title: A Ilha que Vive na Neve! Escalando as Drum Rockies!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E22

programme.sub-title: As Flores de Cerejeira de Hiluluk! Uma Vontade Herdada!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E25

programme.sub-title: O Fruto do Diabo do Tipo Zoan! As Sete Formas de Chopper!
programme.desc: One Piece - T02E27

programme.title: 2001. Luffy está em seu confronto final com Wapol, mas Dalton decide que Drum precisa ruir, custe o que custar, e recomeçar do zero. Para isso, é capaz de uma medida drástica! programme.desc: Death Note - T01E36

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E37

programme.title: 2007. O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E01

programme.title: 2007. Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E10

programme.title: 2023. É o jogo do amor, quando o galã de Hollywood Jean-Claude Magnum desafia Mai para um duelo para ganhar sua mão em casamento! programme.title: 2023. É o primeiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, e Yugi luta contra o espírito maligno do Anel do Milênio, que possui Bakura! Yugi destrói os espectros grotescos de Bakura rapidamente, mas Bakura tem uma estratégia saída direto do cemitério... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: 2023. Bakura aciona a Tábua do Destino, que fará Yugi perder automaticamente em cinco turnos! Como se isso já não fosse ruim, o Santuário das Trevas de Bakura afeta os pontos de vida de Yugi a cada ataque! Incapaz de atacar e ficando sem tempo, Yugi está preso! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E38

programme.title: 2008. O Raimon está treinando duro para o próximo jogo na fronteira do futebol e as pessoas estão começando a espioná-lo; incluindo seus próximos oponentes - Mikage Sennou Junior High. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E07

programme.title: 2008. É outro grande jogo para Raimon, contra os cyborgs de Mikage Sennou. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E08

programme.title: 2008. Gouenji está lesionado e está fora do próximo jogo de Raimon, mas seus adversários são o time mais fraco de todo o torneio, portanto, vencer não deve ser um problema. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E09

programme.title: 2008. Raimon Junior High está mais forte do que nunca, mas o mesmo acontece com as forças contra eles. Mas tão desesperados são seus inimigos para impedi-los de ter sucesso a qualquer custo, eles cruzam a linha e se expõem sem querer! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E10

programme.title: 2008. O grande jogo contra o Teikoku está a apenas alguns dias, mas, a menos que Raimon consiga encontrar um novo treinador, eles estarão fora sem sequer pisar em campo! Toda a equipe está olhando alto e baixo, eles vão encontrar um ou não. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E11

programme.title: 2008. Raimon chega à Academia Teikoku para o maior jogo de suas vidas, mas antes que eles possam começar, eles precisam dissipar a nuvem de suspeita que paira sobre o lugar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A final com o Instituto Imperial Parte 1

programme.title: 2009. Com Kageyama fechado com segurança, o jogo contra Teikoku começou corretamente, e é um jogo real desta vez. Quem ganha isso sai por cima. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A final com o Instituto Imperial Parte 2

programme.title: 2009. Raimon ainda não acredita que derrotou Teikoku e é o novo campeão do distrito. Depois que a poeira comemorativa se instala, uma figura misteriosa entra no bar de ramen de Hibiki. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E14

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está de olho no torneio nacional e está determinado a vencê-lo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E15

programme.title: 2009. Com Kazemaru ainda na equipe, por enquanto, Raimon pode avançar e se concentrar nos nacionais. E eles precisarão o primeiro jogo é contra a rápida Sengoku Igajima Junior High. Se não vencerem, o sonho acaba antes mesmo de começar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E16

programme.title: 2009. A estreita vitória sobre Sengoku Igajima deu a Raimon confiança, mas do outro lado do torneio, todo mundo está chocado com a derrota completa de Teikoku nas mãos da Zeus Junior High, que é 10-0. O que Kidou deve fazer. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E17

programme.title: 2009. Com seu poder de fogo impulsionado pela adição de Kidou Yuuto, a equipe está pronta para enfrentar o Senbayama Junior High e sua defesa inquebrável. Mas, a menos que eles tenham seu passe coordenado, todo o seu trabalho árduo não dará em nada. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E18

programme.title: 2009. Ichinose Kazuya está de volta! Como uma fênix, ele ressuscitou das cinzas e voltou para visitar seus velhos amigos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E19

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está se preparando para enfrentar seu próximo grande oponente, Kidokawa Seishuu, que por acaso é a velha escola de Gouenji. Certos membros dessa equipe ainda guardam rancor contra ele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A técnica definitiva o triângulo Z
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E20

programme.title: 2009. Os trigêmeos Mukata e seu rancor domina Raimon a cada passo, mas eles precisam encontrar a força para superar sua malícia se quiserem chegar à final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E21

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Junior High chegou à final, mas todos estão ficando nervosos por jogar o aterrorizante Zeus Junior High. Endou está convencido de que não é bom o suficiente. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E22

programme.title: 2009. À medida que as finais contra Zeus se aproximam, o mesmo acontece com a expectativa e o medo de Raimon. A equipe está trabalhando duro, mas o nível a ser atingido parece estar além do alcance deles. Eles chegarão a tempo da final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E23

programme.title: 2009. O grande jogo com Zeus está quase em cima deles, mas Endou ainda não domina Majin The Hand. O treinador Hibiki decide que todos passem a noite na escola em um campo de treinamento para a festa do pijama. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E24

programme.title: 2009. É isso, chegou a final do Nacional. O Zeus Junior High venceu rapidamente e nada que o Raimon Junior High faça tenha efeito neles. Eles são realmente deuses. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E25

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Junior High está abaixo de três gols e está sendo derrotado pelos deuses do futebol do Zeus Junior High. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E26

programme.title: 2009. A vitória de Raimon prova ter uma vida muito curta, pois apenas alguns minutos após a vitória o céu cai. De repente, a terra é invadida por alienígenas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E29

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Eleven nunca desiste, e eles vão tentar novamente contra a Aliea Academy. Eles vão cara a cara, mas a Academia Aliea é muito poderosa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby: Unrated
programme.desc: NASCAR driver Ricky Bobby faces his greatest challenge ever when French Formula One driver Jean Girard roars onto the scene. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Sacha Baron Cohen.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan returns to Queens where Raq tries to mend the many fractures in the Thomas family; as Raq expands her empire, Kanan doubts his future in the drug game; Detective Howard gets released from the hospital.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq learns she may have a snitch and tasks Marvin with confirming the rumor; Lou brings in a potential new artist, but he and Crown disagree; Kanan helps Famous sell mix tapes; Jukebox tracks down her estranged mother.

programme.title: Blood Quantum
programme.desc: The dead are coming back to life and almost all of Earth's population is decimated due to a zombie virus, except for the isolated Mi'kmaq reserve of Red Crow, whose indigenous inhabitants are strangely immune to the zombie plague. Starring Michael Greyeyes, Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Forrest Goodluck.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brother's mysterious death. Starring Scott Eastwood, Mel Gibson, Tyrese Gibson.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ranna tries to fulfill the laws that keep Praxis protected; Magnus figures out how the tremors and power fluctuations can be controlled.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen returns to find that the sanctuary has been trashed and members of the team have been attacking one another.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Three flightless birds (Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride) investigate the mysterious arrival of green pigs to their island paradise. Starring Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them. Starring Hank Azaria, Neil Patrick Harris, Jayma Mays.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel. Starring Neil Patrick Harris, Brendan Gleeson, Jayma Mays.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own. Starring Kirsten Dunst, Jim Sturgess, Timothy Spall.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancée's (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers and falls in love with a struggling, but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him. Starring Bradley Cooper, Lady Gaga, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: A surprise encounter with Howard leaves Kanan speechless; Raquel tries to settle in new territory, but while investigating a missing business associate with her money, she meets an old adversary.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan and Jukebox search for answers in family matters; when Raq's push into new territory stalls, she proposes a meeting; Crown helps Famous get settled; Still investigating Howard's shooting, Burke questions Unique.

programme.title: Nurse.Fighter.Boy
programme.desc: An urban love story tells of the heart of a fighter. Starring Clark Johnson, Karen LeBlanc, Daniel J. Gordon.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductor's identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Members of the mysterious and spooky Addams Family -- Gomez, Morticia, Pugsley, Wednesday, Uncle Fester and Grandma -- encounter a shady TV personality who despises their eerie hilltop mansion. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Addams Family 2
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer as a family, Gomez, Morticia and the rest of the Addams clan embark on an adventurous road trip in a hideous and humongous camper. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: Watermark
programme.desc: This documentary brings together diverse stories from around the globe and explores our relationship with water and how it shapes humanity. Starring Edward Burtynsky.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of art scholars and other experts infiltrates enemy territory to retrieve stolen masterpieces before the Nazis destroy them. Starring George Clooney, Matt Damon, Bill Murray.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's acclaimed account of an English boy's life in a WWII internment camp in Japanese-occupied China. Starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich, Miranda Richardson.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times. Starring Zachary Levi, Meghann Fahy, Patricia Heaton.

programme.title: Armageddon Time
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about the strength of family and the generational pursuit of the American dream. Starring Anne Hathaway, Jeremy Strong, Michael Banks Repeta.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq focuses on mother-son bonding with Kanan in the Catskills, but they get interrupted when business follows them; Crown disrespects Lou, bringing their simmering beef to a boil; Burke digs into Howard's personal life.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq assures everyone they need to follow orders and keep working as planned; Kanan takes on more responsibility, but things go wrong when he runs into neighborhood kids; Lou feels the pressure in his partnership with Crown.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: The F Word
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend. Starring Daniel Radcliffe, Zoe Kazan, Megan Park.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry's double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee. Starring Laurence Fishburne, Angela Bassett, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An image consultant transforms a tomboyish FBI agent into a beauty queen so she can work undercover to catch a terrorist. Starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt.

programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the town's full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcott's classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy, Paul Bettany, Alan Tudyk), competes against nobles in 14th-century France. Starring Heath Ledger, Mark Addy, Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Jumping back in time, Gia struggles to write her book about sex in America; embarking on a love story of her own, Gia processes the pain of her own losses; she moves to Indiana and bonds with Lina.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina, Sloane, and Maggie connect with their hearts' desire, unaware of the fallout that awaits them.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Mélanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Being Canadian
programme.desc: Rob Cohen tries to find out what it really means to be Canadian.

programme.title: Bring Your Smile Along
programme.desc: A New England teacher (Constance Towers) goes to New York and helps a pop composer (Keefe Brasselle) write a singer's (Frankie Laine) hits. Starring Frankie Laine, Constance Towers, Keefe Brasselle.

programme.title: Record of a Tenement Gentleman
programme.desc: A widow (Choko Iida) in postwar Japan begrudgingly adopts an abandoned boy (Hohi Aoki) whom she grows to love. Starring Choko Iida, Hohi Aoki, Shohichi Kawamura.

programme.desc: A soldier returns home at the end of World War II, and refuses to forgive his wife for prostituting herself one night to pay off medical bills for their son during the heights of the war. Starring Kinuyo Tanaka, Shûji Sano, Chieko Murata.

programme.desc: Two sisters move home in trouble where they learn their mother is not dead. Starring Ineko Arima, Kamatari Fujiwara, Setsuko Hara.

programme.desc: Fugitive lovers Keechie (Cathy O'Donnell) and Bowie (Farley Granger) are doomed by fate from the start. Starring Cathy O'Donnell, Farley Granger, Howard Da Silva.

programme.title: A Woman's Secret
programme.desc: A piano player (Melvyn Douglas) tells a detective about two singers (Maureen O'Hara, Gloria Grahame), one supposedly shot by the other. Starring Maureen O'Hara, Melvyn Douglas, Gloria Grahame.

programme.desc: A woman (Joan Fontaine) milks an affair with a writer (Robert Ryan) and marriage to a rich businessman (Zachary Scott). Starring Joan Fontaine, Robert Ryan, Zachary Scott.

programme.desc: A New York detective (Robert Ryan) falls for the blind sister (Ida Lupino) of a rural killer sought by a victim's father (Ward Bond). Starring Ida Lupino, Robert Ryan, Ward Bond.

programme.title: Party Girl
programme.desc: A gangster's (Lee J. Cobb) lawyer (Robert Taylor) turns against him for a nightclub dancer (Cyd Charisse) in Roaring '20s Chicago. Starring Robert Taylor, Cyd Charisse, Lee J. Cobb.

programme.title: 55 Days at Peking
programme.desc: Soldiers from 11 countries and a Marine major (Charlton Heston) guard a besieged compound during the Boxer Rebellion. Starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, David Niven.

programme.title: The Beast of the City
programme.desc: A police chief (Walter Huston) fighting crime and corruption is betrayed by his brother (Wallace Ford) who falls for a gun moll (Jean Harlow). Starring Walter Huston, Jean Harlow, Wallace Ford.

programme.title: Frances

programme.title: Gable and Lombard

programme.title: The Story of Will Rogers
programme.desc: The homespun humorist and social critic (Will Rogers Jr.) starts as a cowboy and goes on to vaudeville, movies, radio. Starring Will Rogers Jr., Jane Wyman.

programme.title: One Way Passage

programme.title: Two Heads on a Pillow
programme.desc: Newlyweds (Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan) break up, then meet again as opposing lawyers on an annulment case. Starring Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan, Henry Armetta.

programme.title: Three Came Home

programme.title: The Four Feathers

programme.title: 6 Day Bike Rider

programme.title: Millionaire Playboy

programme.title: No Time for Sergeants

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Near Gunnison, Colo., Jake Millison goes missing; the outcome seems grim as the months wear on, but a break in the case unravels the mystery behind his disappearance, revealing a greed-fueled plot far more sinister than anyone can imagine.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A beloved teacher is brutally murdered in her own home just days before Christmas, leaving a community in shock; for 25 years, the case remains unsolved, until an unexpected break in DNA technology reveals a connection no one sees coming.

programme.title: My Sister's Double Life
programme.desc: When Chelsea's sister vanishes after a late-night shift at a diner, she tries to convince the police that she's been abducted. Racing against the clock, she soon discovers that her sister's captor is now after her as well. Starring Sarah Grey, Amalia Williamson, Cody Ray Thompson.

programme.title: My Mother Stole My Life
programme.desc: A woman steals her estranged daughter's identity to escape from an abusive boyfriend. However, when he tracks her down, she finds herself in even more danger. Starring Patrice Goodman, Blaise Crocker, JaNae Armogan.

programme.title: Don't Open the Door
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of a woman inside a suitcase; despite the killer's grisly attempt to obscure her identity, detectives identify the victim as 28-year-old swimsuit model Jasmine Fiore.

programme.title: Barons
programme.desc: Mac turns up in Woogonga and calls in a debt that Snapper can't pay; Trotter races to win back Tracy and LightWave; Buddy and Hunter finally have to face the truth about their future together.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: A shocking revelation of an affair leads Amanda and Ted to focus their attention on Yoon Sun and Olivia as prime suspects; Ted is confronted to discover his past is still very much in the present.

programme.title: Don't Open the Door
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of a woman inside a suitcase; despite the killer's grisly attempt to obscure her identity, detectives identify the victim as 28-year-old swimsuit model Jasmine Fiore.

programme.title: Barons

programme.title: Troppo

programme.title: My Sister's Double Life
programme.desc: When Chelsea's sister vanishes after a late-night shift at a diner, she tries to convince the police that she's been abducted. Racing against the clock, she soon discovers that her sister's captor is now after her as well. Starring Sarah Grey, Amalia Williamson, Cody Ray Thompson.

programme.title: My Mother Stole My Life
programme.desc: A woman steals her estranged daughter's identity to escape from an abusive boyfriend. However, when he tracks her down, she finds herself in even more danger. Starring Patrice Goodman, Blaise Crocker, JaNae Armogan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A beloved teacher is brutally murdered in her own home just days before Christmas, leaving a community in shock; for 25 years, the case remains unsolved, until an unexpected break in DNA technology reveals a connection no one sees coming.

programme.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: After a series of security lapses, Wells Fargo had over $7 Million stolen in one night in a heist dubbed White Eagle; bizarrely, it was pulled of by a revolutionary guerrilla group from Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Shawnie meets Ron online and the romance develops over a shared love of athletics; Shawnie moves to the mountains to be with Ron, but when his erratic behavior turns from manipulative to criminal, she must confront Ron's secret life.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A savvy poker player cleans up at the tables once at sea, but when she witnesses a man overboard, many begin to wonder if it was accidental or on purpose.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A farmer and his wife take a cruise celebrating their hard work and good fortune, but their luck changes drastically and the friends who are on board celebrating with them now aid in the search for the farmer who is now missing at sea.

programme.title: Chosen Family
programme.desc: Yoga teacher Ann cannot escape her manic family and miserable dating life. Things start looking up, however, when her friends set her up with a divorced dad who has an adorable 7-year-old daughter. Starring Heather Graham, John Brotherton, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: God's Creatures
programme.desc: A mother tells a lie for her beloved son that rips apart their family and close-knit Irish town -- ultimately testing her own sense of right and wrong. Starring Emily Watson, Paul Mescal, Aisling Franciosi.

programme.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: The Painter
programme.desc: An ex-CIA operative is tracked down by a young woman and they become entangled in an unauthorized black ops program. Starring Charlie Weber, Madison Bailey, Jon Voight.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A savvy poker player cleans up at the tables once at sea, but when she witnesses a man overboard, many begin to wonder if it was accidental or on purpose.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A family man goes missing in a small West Virginian town known for its sweet mountain air.

programme.title: Birdeater
programme.desc: A bride-to-be joins her own fiancé's bachelor party in the remote Australian Outback. As the festivities spiral into beer-soaked chaos, uncomfortable details about their relationship are exposed, turning the celebration into a feral nightmare. Starring Mackenzie Fearnley, Shabana Azeez, Ben Hunter.

programme.title: Some Other Woman
programme.desc: Eve sees a strange woman watching her and her husband from outside their home. As the stranger slowly intrudes further into their lives, Eve begins to question if she's losing her mind or her husband's loyalty. Starring Tom Felton, Amanda Crew, Ashley Greene.
